mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ship ( corp_id, name, class_no, imo, class_notation, flag_state, port, ton, dead_weight, lbp, shipbuilder, hull_number, delivery_date, build_date, create_date ) VALUES ( #{corpId}, #{name}, #{classNo}, #{imo}, #{classNotation}, #{flagState}, #{port}, #{ton}, #{deadWeight}, #{lbp}, #{shipbuilder}, #{hullNumber}, #{deliveryDate}, #{buildDate}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ship WHERE corp_id = #{corpId}
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR class_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR imo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE ship SET name = #{name}, class_no = #{classNo}, imo = #{imo}, class_notation = #{classNotation}, flag_state = #{flagState}, port = #{port}, ton = #{ton}, dead_weight = #{deadWeight}, lbp = #{lbp}, shipbuilder = #{shipbuilder}, hull_number = #{hullNumber}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, build_date = #{buildDate} WHERE ship_id = #{shipId} AND corp_id = #{corpId}
